song.title: Freedom is Here
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] The future comes alive You speak Your word and I Am running into Your hope Cause I’ve seen Your light You bring my world to life I’m coming after Your love
[P] I’m not shaking I’m not letting go
[C] Everything comes alive In my life as we lift You higher Let Your freedom arise In our lives as we lift You up Sing it out Sing it out Your freedom is here
[V2] You take the limits off No matter what the cost I’m running after Your call And I will run this race To see You face to face So let Your power overflow
[B] I will not fear I will not hide Your love Your love All of my life I cannot deny Your love Your love
